sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
RIGHT had no impact - the player is blocked by the frame wall. I need to enter the frame through an opening. Looking at the image, the frame at rows 24-27, cols 44-47 appears to be a 4x4 dark gray rectangle. The player can't move RIGHT into it directly.
Let me reconsider the approach. Maybe I need to go around the frame - either above or below it - to reach the right side where there might be an opening. Or maybe I need to use SPACE from a different position.
Actually, looking more carefully at the image, the frame seems to have an opening on the bottom side (rows 28-31 area). Let me try going DOWN and then RIGHT to get to the right side of the frame, then UP to enter from below.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# RIGHT blocked by frame wall
# Need to find an opening in the frame
# Frame at rows 24-27, cols 44-47
# Try going DOWN to go around, then RIGHT, then UP
action(['DOWN', 'DOWN', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'UP', 'UP'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
